allOf.description: Configuration for an HTTPS logging endpoint.

url.description: The URL to send logs to via HTTPS.

request_max_entries.description: The maximum number of log entries per batch.

request_max_bytes.description: The maximum number of bytes per batch.

content_type.description: The content type of the log payload.

header_name.description: Name of the custom header sent with the log payload.

header_value.description: Value of the custom header sent with the log payload.

method.description: The HTTP method used for sending logs.

json_format.description: Enforces valid JSON formatting for log entries.

tls_hostname.description: The hostname to verify the server certificate against.

tls_ca_cert.description: A secure certificate to authenticate a server with.
